name: Lemon-Lime Soda Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Instant pudding - Coconut or pineapple cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cake mix, pudding mix, lemon-lime soda, and oil in a large bowl. Mix well.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
3. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9x13-inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes.
5. For frosting: In a saucepan, mix sugar, flour, and pineapple until the flour is moistened. Stir in egg yolks, coconut, and butter. Cook until very thick. Spread over cake while both are hot.
